# WC2026 Fantasy — Daily Backups

Automated daily `pg_dump` of the Supabase database.
Generated by `.github/workflows/daily-backup.yml` at 7:00 AM IST every day.

## Contents

Each `backup-YYYY-MM-DD.sql` file contains `INSERT` statements for:
- `users` — player accounts, balances
- `leagues` — league config, bet amounts, prod_mode
- `matches` — all 104 fixtures + results
- `predictions` — all player picks with bold flag

Last 30 days of backups are kept (older files auto-deleted).

## To restore

```bash
psql "postgresql://postgres.wxolmlxphwieqvyfuyfu:[PASSWORD]@aws-0-ap-southeast-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres" < backups/backup-YYYY-MM-DD.sql
```

Or paste contents into Supabase SQL Editor manually.
